overview: Dr. Marc Braman provides comprehensive lifestyle medicine care that addresses root causes of health conditions through preventive, evidence-based approaches. The practice serves patients in Salem, Oregon with treatment for weight loss, diabetes, arthritis, high blood pressure, heart disease, sleep disorders, and other conditions.
highlights: Lifestyle medicine approach treating root causes rather than symptoms
Alzheimer's prevention and early treatment programs
targetAudience: Patients seeking comprehensive preventive health management through lifestyle medicine approaches rather than symptom-focused treatment.
